spotlight.headline: The AI skills that fully replaced a $4k/mo executive assistant
spotlight.whyKiller: Research meeting attendees, gather email history, create meeting briefs, and manage action items via Todoist — the complete EA workflow automated by Auth0's former VP of Marketing/Growth.

spotlight.quote: These skills fully replaced my human executive assistant.
